characters.name: Cedric
characters.description: CedricInfoNicknameDennis RodmanAge16-17OccupationStudent at Boring High, member of Drama ClubAffiliationDrama Club, AV ClubActorJalon HowardFirst Appearance"All That and a Bag of Chips"Last Appearance"We Were Merely Freshmen"

characters.name: Corn Dog Kid
characters.description: Corn dog kidInfoAge14-16ActorCarter JonFirst Appearance"Plutonium"Last Appearance"We Were Merely Freshmen"  The Corn dog kid is a minor character and a student at Boring High. InPlutonium, Emaline grabs his corn dog while doing a dramatic scene with Oliver to pretend to slit her throat leading to a comedic fake death scene. In"We Were Merely Freshmen", he is shown watching the premiere of Intergalactic Lust in the audience. Not much is known about him.
characters.personality_section: Not much is known about him.

characters.name: Emaline Addario
characters.description: Emaline AddarioInfoAge16Born1980OccupationStudentAffiliationDrama ClubRelationshipsKate Messner(girlfriend)Oliver Schermerhorn(ex-boyfriend)ActorSydney SweeneyFirst Appearance"Plutonium"Last Appearance"We Were Merely Freshmen" Oliver Schermerhorn(ex-boyfriend) Kate and Emaline kiss passionately as their love for each other gets closer. Drama is Emaline's life. Not only in acting, but also privately. She loves eccentric outfits and makes her regularly public scenes. She is passionate, jealous, and often unsure of what she tries to duplicate with her brisk performance. This changes when Oliver leaves and begins growing closer with Kate.
characters.personality_section: Drama is Emaline's life. Not only in acting, but also privately. She loves eccentric outfits and makes her regularly public scenes. characters.name: Jessica Betts
characters.description: Jessica BettsInfoAge16-17OccupationCo-host on morning annoucements, student at Boring HighAffiliationDrama Club, AV ClubRelationshipsScott Pocket(co-host)ActorNicole McCulloughFirst Appearance"Plutonium"Last Appearance"We Were Merely Freshmen"Jessica Betts is a recurring character at a student at Boring High. Jessica Betts, along with Scott Pocket, host the morning announcements for the school. She is often seen shutting down Scott's attempts at making inappropriate or childish jokes. She is cast in Luke's film "Intergalactic Lust" landing a minor role as the president. She is a perfectionist and expresses rage and frustration when things do not work out. She is a perfectionist and expresses rage and frustration when things do not work out.

characters.name: Kate Messner
characters.description: Kate MessnerInfoAge15BornAugust 28, 1981OccupationStudent at Boring High SchoolA/V Club MemberAffiliationA/V ClubRelationshipsEmaline Addario(girlfriend)Luke O'Neil(ex-“cover-up”boyfriend)RelativesKen Messner(father)Unnamed motherActorPeyton KennedyFirst Appearance"Plutonium"Last Appearance"We Were Merely Freshmen" Luke O'Neil(ex-“cover-up”boyfriend) Unnamed mother Kate Messner is very withdrawn and very shy. She has few friends and is not very popular either. She joined the video club because she wanted a quiet club and did not want to run for her as a spokesperson, unlike her father's. It's also hard for her to raise issues that might hurt others. However, it is also very important to Kate that her friends are fine. For example, she wanted to do something good for Luke by bringing him to her father. Besides, she has shown him that with his actions he can hurt others, her father, as he threw him out of her house. Kate has seen that her father was finally happy again, so she was ready to get louder, which she rarely does.

characters.name: Leslie
characters.description: LeslieLeslieInfoAge15Born1981OccupationStudent at Boring HighAffiliationBoring High A/V ClubActorAbi BrittleFirst Appearance"Plutonium"Last Appearance"We Were Merely Freshmen" Leslieis a minor character ofEverything Sucks!. She is the religious member of the school's A/V Club. She is portrayed byAbi Brittle.  Leslie is annoying, loud, but she means well. She has a crush on Tyler, but he doesn't seem to like her back. She tells Kate that Luke wasn't worth it, but Kate pushes her away. An example of this is that Leslie said to Kate, "I can't believe you dated that "A hole" and then said, "Luke more like Puke." Then Kate said, "Leslie, I get it already." She is also religious and caring.  However she is not one to put her beliefs before her friendships even though we don't see it because the first and only season does have her interact with after Kate after realizing their is something going on between Kate and Emaline.

characters.name: Luke O'Neil
characters.description: Luke O'NeilLuke O'NeilInfoAge14Born1982OccupationStudent at Boring HighAffiliationBoring High A/V ClubRelationshipsKate Messner(ex-girlfriend)RelativesSherry O'Neil(Mother)Leroy O'Neil (Father)ActorJahi Di'Allo WinstonFirst Appearance"Plutonium"Last Appearance"We Were Merely Freshmen"Luke O'Neilis the main protagonist ofEverything Sucks!. On the first day in high school, he falls in love withKate, who soon admits to him that she is a lesbian. Luke wants to be a director and is member of the school's A/V Club. He is portrayed byJahi Di'Allo Winston. Leroy O'Neil (Father) Luke's father left the family when he was still very young, because he could never give up his dream of making it as a filmmaker in Hollywood. Luke grew up with his mother Sherry, who works as a stewardess. Because of her job, Luke was and is regularly alone for a long time.

characters.name: McQuaid
characters.description: McQuaidMcQuaidInfoAge15 (possibly)Born1981 or 1982 (possibly)OccupationStudent at Boring HighA/V Club MemberAffiliationA/V ClubRelationshipsEmaline Addario(one sided crush on his side)ActorRio ManginiFirst Appearance"Plutonium"Last Appearance"We Were Merely Freshmen" A/V Club Member DanielMcQuaidis one of the main characters ofEverything Sucks!and a student at Boring High School. Along withTylerhe is one of Luke's best friends. He is portrayed byRio Mangini. At first glance, McQuaid is a typical nerd: socially rather shy and an absolute high-flyer at school. Before he acts, he weighs the risks rationally, which usually results in his not taking any. He is very straight forward, but will also be sarcastic. He is protective of his friends, and will t6ry to stop them from doing anything that can get them into danger.

characters.name: Oliver Schermerhorn
characters.description: OliverOliverInfoAge18 (possibly)Born1978 or 1979 (possibly)OccupationStudent at Boring High (formerly)Member of the Drama Club (formerly)AffiliationDrama ClubRelationshipsEmaline Addario(ex-girlfriend)ActorElijah StevensonFirst AppearancePlutoniumLast AppearanceI Just Wanna Be AnybodyOliver Schmerhornis one of the main protagonists ofEverything Sucks.He is a student of Boring High School and a prominent member of the drama club. He dreams of an acting career and can not wait to leave Boring and find happiness in New York. He is portrayed byElijah Stevenson. Member of the Drama Club (formerly) Oliver is a typical actor: eccentric, self-loving, but also very sensitive. Oliver is a typical actor: eccentric, self-loving, but also very sensitive.
characters.personality_section: Oliver is a typical actor: eccentric, self-loving, but also very sensitive.

He is one of the hosts on the morning announcements along withJessica Betts. Luke O'Neil(friend)  Besides being slightly perverted, he is also shown to be helpful as evident in the last episode when Luke makes last minute changes toIntergalactic Lust.

characters.name: Sherry O'Neil
characters.description: Sherry O'NeilInfoOccupationStewardessRelationshipsKen Messner(boyfriend)Leroy O‘Neil(ex-husband)RelativesLuke O'Neil(son)ActorClaudine Nako Leroy O‘Neil(ex-husband) Sherry O'Neilis the single mother ofLuke. As a stewardess she is often away, but still has a very close and loving relationship with her son. She is portrayed byClaudine Nako.

characters.name: Tyler
characters.description: TylerInfoNicknameProtoge (by Oliver)Age14 - 15Born1981 or 1982 (possibly)OccupationStudent at Boring High SchoolA/V Club MemberAffiliationA/V ClubRelativesUnnamed momunnamed dadunnamed StepdadActorQuinn LieblingFirst Appearance"Plutonium"Last Appearance"We Were Merely Freshmen"TylerEdward Randolph Bowenis a main character onEverything Sucks!. Tyler is a student of Boring High School and one of Luke's best friends, along with McQuaid. He is portrayed by Quinn Liebling. unnamed dadunnamed Stepdad Tyler is a freshman at Boring High in the A/V Club. He was originally scared of the Drama club, but warms up to them, due to their humor similar to his own. Tyler is always in a good mood, except when his friends, who have top priority in his life, abandon him for girls. He has a literacy spelling weakness, which presents him with some challenges at school. He is very awkward, but once others get to know him he is a good friend.
